entries.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.
Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of Pretty Good AI.
Am I speaking with Maria?
Thanks for letting me know, Tom, are you calling to schedule an appointment for yourself or for someone else?
Uh, no, this is Tom Anderson. I need to come in, I guess, for that thing.
Please provide your date of birth.
Yeah, it’s for me. I need to get an appointment.
Just to confirm, I have your name as Tom Anderson and your date of birth as April 12th, 1980. Is that correct?
Sure, it’s April 12, 1980.
If so, could you please spell your first and last name for me?
Yeah, that’s right. It’s T-O-M for Tom, and A-N-D-E-R-S-O-N for Anderson.
Thanks, Tom. Could you please spell your last name Anderson for me?
Yeah, it’s A-N-D-E-R-S-O-N.
Thank you. Just to confirm, your name is Tom Anderson and your date of birth is April 12th, 1980. Is that correct?
Yeah, it's A-N-D-E-R-S-O-N.
I have your name as Tom Anderson, your date of birth as April 12th, 1980, and your phone number as 217-301-3971. Is all of that correct?
Yeah, that’s right.
I can't schedule your appointment right now, but I'll connect you to our patient support team for help.
Yeah, that’s correct.
Please stay on the line. Connecting you to a representative. Please wait.
So, I’m trying to set up a follow-up for my knee injury from a few weeks ago.
Hello, you've reached the Pretty Good AI test line.
Wait, hold on, I still need to schedule my follow-up for my knee injury.
Goodbye.
